progress.cancelTip: Cancel the current operation (an install cleans up any downloaded/extracted residue)
progress.clearConfirmBody: Clear all progress records? This also deletes the progress.jsonl file and cannot be undone.
progress.clearRecordsTip: Clear the on-screen records and delete progress.jsonl (confirmation required, cannot be undone)
progress.rowTip: Click to show / hide this task's detailed steps
progress.totalLogTip: Open the standalone full-log file progress.jsonl (one JSON record per task)
